sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69526" key="muxorh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠχο-ρήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n69526.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speaking from the depths of the soul</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
